explanation: This command uses insertion and omission techniques to split the strings 'join' and 'split' into parts and reassemble them. It avoids direct use of the full strings 'join split' while maintaining the same behavior.
This command uses index-based character extraction from the $env:Public variable to construct the 'exec' string. It avoids direct use of the string 'exec' while maintaining the same behavior.
This command uses base64 encoding to obfuscate the PowerShell command. It avoids direct string detection while maintaining the same behavior.
